name: Aaron Wiley
bio: Father, coach, community advocate, and tech founder fighting for the West Side of Salt Lake City. Aaron has lived on the West Side for decades, coached youth sports for 20+ years, and led the community fight against Stericycle pollution. He is running to give District 21 the representation it deserves.

caucus.address: 1105 W 1000 N, Salt Lake City, UT 84116
